evals.prompt: I'm starting a new React project and I need to make sure my code is clean from the start. Can you set up ESLint and Prettier for me? Use strict rules so I don't use 'any' anywhere.
evals.expected_output: Installation of eslint, prettier, and typescript-eslint. Creation of a strict eslint.config.js and .prettierrc. Update to package.json with lint scripts.
assertions: The eslint.config.js file uses Flat Config format (v9+)

evals.prompt: Our team's code is a mess. Can you add husky and lint-staged to our project so we can't commit if there are linting errors?
evals.expected_output: Installation of husky and lint-staged. Configuration of husky (pre-commit hook) and lint-staged in package.json or a config file.
assertions: A .husky/pre-commit file is created or mentioned
The prompt results in automated enforcement setup
